items.headline: MC-Updater Is Now Available
items.message:
MC-Updater is now available as a separate tool for MiSTer Companion.

It is designed to make future MiSTer Companion updates easier by handling the update process for you.

Once MC-Updater is installed, MiSTer Companion will recognize the updater tool and use it for supported future updates.

At the moment, MC-Updater only works on Windows. A Linux version is currently being worked on.
